title: Squirrel Removal in Floral Park, Long Island | $900-$2,500
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Floral Park, Long Island. Humane trapping, exclusion & damage repair. Licensed experts serving Floral Park homes. Call today for a free estimate!
intro: Floral Park homeowners know that squirrels can quickly turn from charming backyard visitors to destructive attic invaders. Our professional squirrel removal services protect your Floral Park property from the damage these persistent rodents cause to insulation, wiring, and structural components. With humane removal techniques and comprehensive exclusion work, we ensure your home stays squirrel-free year-round.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has been serving Floral Park and the greater Long Island area for years, combining local expertise with proven wildlife removal methods. Our licensed technicians understand the unique challenges of Floral Park's tree-lined neighborhoods and provide customized solutions with transparent pricing and guaranteed results.
localContext: Floral Park's beautiful historic homes and mature tree canopy along streets like Tulip Avenue and near landmarks such as the Floral Park Memorial High School create ideal conditions for squirrel activity. The proximity to Belmont Park and numerous parks means local squirrels frequently seek shelter in residential attics, especially during colder months when these agile pests look for warm nesting sites.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Floral Park?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Floral Park typically ranges from $900 to $2,500 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of damage repair needed. This includes humane trapping, complete exclusion work, and sanitation of affected areas. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates before beginning any work.

faqs.question: What are signs of squirrels in my Floral Park attic?
faqs.answer: Common signs include scratching or scurrying sounds in your attic or walls, especially during dawn and dusk, visible droppings, chewed wood or wires, torn insulation, and squirrels entering or exiting through roof vents or soffits. You may also notice an increase in squirrel activity on your roof or notice damaged shingles and fascia boards around your roofline.

faqs.question: Is squirrel removal in Floral Park humane?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use only humane, legal methods for squirrel removal in Floral Park. Our approach includes live trapping and relocation according to New York State wildlife regulations, one-way exclusion doors that allow squirrels to leave but not return, and prevention techniques that don't harm the animals. We never use poisons or inhumane trapping methods.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my Floral Park home?
faqs.answer: Most squirrel removal projects in Floral Park are completed within 3-7 days, though timeline depends on the number of squirrels and complexity of the infestation. We typically begin with same-day or next-day service for inspections, set traps immediately, and perform exclusion work to prevent re-entry. Follow-up visits ensure all squirrels are removed and entry points are permanently sealed.
